title: More Music Discs (Records)
description: Unlock the mystical melodies of over 30 new music discs!
body:
## 📖Introduction📖
Hello! Ever feel like the Music Discs in Minecraft are a bit limited? This mod adds new Music Discs/Records for 1.16, 1.18, 1.19, and 1.20 made by YouTube creators to the game! This mod currently adds 36 music discs which can all be crafted!

All you need is eight flint and one iron ingot. Using a crafting table, surround the iron ingot with the flint and that'll craft 3 blank music discs. If you put the blank music discs in a jukebox, they won't do anything. You first need to combine them with an item in a smithing table to make the assorted tracks. This mod also adds many new advancements too! To see the recipes for the certain tracks in-game, look down below in the tracks section. Oh, and all vanilla discs are now smithable too...and Pigstep is very hard to get.

Check out the video below to see how it works: 
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/MKtYboPIp_c" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Tracks/Artists/Recipes
I got permission from some people to use their songs and for the others they said anyone could use their songs as long as they were credited (Which they are) so I am using all these songs with proper permission.

Check out all the songs on the YouTube playlist I made [here!](https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PL81F-aBVGVtcGTuU8D64-UQKVcQBdD3V7&si=61QPUIWtLs8BQjUL) (Including planned unreleased tracks 👀)


Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks or YouTube videos as well!
